hero.title: Connecting Safety and Awareness.
hero.subtitle: SafeLink is a platform dedicated to combating human trafficking, offering verification tools, educational resources, and a safe space to share information and make reports.

verification.title: Verification Tool
verification.subtitle: Received a suspicious message, job offer, or photo? Use our AI-powered tool to analyze the content and identify potential risks.
verification.image_text_placeholder: Add context or the message accompanying the image (optional)...
verification.spinner_text: Analyzing... This may take a few seconds.
verification.error_no_image: Please select an image to analyze.
verification.error_api: Could not analyze the content. Please try again later.

education.title: Understand to Protect
education.subtitle: Information is our greatest weapon. Learn to recognize the signs of human trafficking and hear stories from those who survived.
education.video1_desc: See how traffickers use job and relationship offers to lure victims.
education.video2_desc: Learn how to protect yourself and young people from online dangers related to trafficking.
education.video3_desc: Learn to identify behaviors and situations that may indicate a case of human trafficking.
education.global_alerts_subtitle: Click on the map points to learn about the most common routes and tactics used by traffickers.
education.hotspot1_desc: A common route for forced labor exploitation in sectors like agriculture and restaurants, often under the promise of high-paying jobs.
education.hotspot2_desc: Primarily associated with sexual exploitation, affecting women and young people lured by false opportunities as models, dancers, or waitresses.
education.hotspot3_desc: Victims are often trafficked for forced domestic labor, construction, and sexual exploitation, taking advantage of economic instability.
education.hotspot4_desc: Complex routes involving both sexual and labor exploitation. Traffickers often pose as 'coyotes' or employment agents.
education.seasons_desc: Human trafficking activity tends to increase during major international events, such as sports competitions or world expos. Holiday periods in tourist destinations and times of economic instability or natural disasters are also periods of high vulnerability.
education.lures_desc: Traffickers are masters of manipulation. The most common tactics include false job offers with unrealistic salaries, the 'loverboy' method (romantic involvement to create emotional dependency), false educational opportunities, and direct threats to the victim or their family. Always be suspicious of offers that seem too good to be true.
education.testimonial1_quote: The promise was a better life, but it became a nightmare. Escaping was just the beginning of the journey. Sharing my story is a way to fight back.
education.testimonial2_quote: They controlled everything: my money, my documents, who I spoke to. I was no longer a person, I was property. Freedom seemed impossible.

share.title: Your Story Matters
share.subtitle: If you or someone you know has been affected by human trafficking, sharing your experience can be an important step towards healing and warning others. Sharing is anonymous and safe.
share.form_disclaimer: Please do not include personal information that could identify you or others.
share.form_consent: I understand that this story will be shared anonymously for awareness purposes.
share.success_subtitle: Your voice is powerful. By sharing your story, you help raise awareness and break the cycle of silence. Your bravery makes a difference.

report.title: Make an Anonymous Report
report.subtitle: If you suspect a case of human trafficking, your report can save lives. Choose the method that is most comfortable for you.
report.form_disclaimer: Describe what you saw or heard. Include as much detail as possible, such as locations, dates, names (if you know them and it's safe), and why you suspect it is human trafficking.
report.form_warning: WARNING: This is not an emergency channel. If someone is in immediate danger, call the police or the emergency hotline.
report.form_guided_what_desc: Describe the events or situation you witnessed.
report.form_guided_what_placeholder: e.g., I saw people in poor working conditions...
report.form_guided_who_desc: Describe the people (victims and/or suspects), if possible.
report.form_guided_who_placeholder: e.g., A group of young people, a recruiter...
report.chat_system_instruction: You are a SafeLink AI assistant. Your role is to help a user file an anonymous report about human trafficking in an empathetic and structured way. Ask clear questions, one at a time, to gather details about what happened, who is involved, where, and when. Always remind the user that in case of immediate danger, they should contact the authorities. Do not give legal advice. Be calm and reassuring.
report.chat_initial_message: Hello. I am the SafeLink virtual assistant, and I'm here to help you file your anonymous report. All information is confidential. To begin, please describe the situation you witnessed.
report.chat_error: Sorry, I couldn't process your message. Please try again.
report.success_subtitle: Your anonymous report has been received. Thank you for taking action. The information will be treated with the utmost confidentiality. If you or someone is in immediate danger, please contact local authorities.

footer.about: An initiative to raise awareness and combat human trafficking through technology and information.
footer.disclaimer_text: SafeLink is a tool for assistance and awareness. It does not replace official reporting to the proper authorities. In case of emergency, contact the police.
